strengths: Broad technical foundation with recent exposure to agentic AI and MCP frameworks, directly relevant to current fintech AI focus
Proven track record shipping production systems at scale—millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby, top-10 App Store ranking at WatchUp
Full-stack technical versatility across multiple languages and domains, demonstrating adaptability across distributed systems challenges
concerns: No demonstrated experience leading or scaling engineering teams—entire background is individual contributor despite Staff titles
Multi-agent AI system experience is recent (current role since April 2025) with no evidence of production agentic framework architecture, evaluation infrastructure, or failure-mode governance
Minimal fintech infrastructure exposure; no experience with credit systems, regulated environments, capital management, or AI-driven financial decisioning
response.justification: Szabo is a technically capable full-stack engineer with recent exposure to agentic AI, but fundamentally unfit for a CTO executive role at a venture-backed fintech scale-up. The resume shows no experience building or leading engineering teams—a core executive function—and his agentic AI exposure is both recent and shallow, lacking evidence of production system architecture, evaluation frameworks, or governance at scale. Additionally, there is minimal fintech domain knowledge (credit systems, compliance, capital management) and no track record operating in regulated environments. While his technical breadth and shipping capability are strengths, they do not compensate for the absence of executive-level leadership experience and domain expertise this role requires.
